message:
Use srcURL directly for iMessage attachments instead of download API

iMessage attachments have local file:// srcURLs pointing to
~/Library/Messages/Attachments/. The code was passing the attachment
UUID as an asset ID to the Beeper download API, which only accepts
mxc:// URLs. Now checks for file:// srcURL first and copies directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
